ability_adjustments.note: Svirfneblin are quick and wise but physically smaller and dour in personality.

magic_resistance.description: Svirfneblin have 20% base magic resistance plus 5% per level.

save_bonus_vs_magic.description: +3 bonus to all saving throws vs. magic.

innate_spell_abilities.description: All svirfneblin can use the following abilities.

non_detection.description: Svirfneblin are permanently under the effect of a non-detection spell, making them very difficult to locate with divination magic.

stealth.description: Svirfneblin can freeze in place and become nearly invisible in rocky terrain. Chance of detection is only 10%.
stealth.condition: rocky or underground terrain, remaining motionless

surprise.description: Surprised only on a 1 on d10. Surprise others on 1-6 on d10 underground.

detect_grades_slopes.description: As gnomes, plus superior underground detection abilities.

light_sensitivity.description: Svirfneblin are adversely affected by bright light, though less so than drow.

summon_earth_elemental.description: Once per day, a group of svirfneblin (3 or more) can attempt to summon a small earth elemental.
